programs.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programs.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programs.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programs.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programs.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programs.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programs.title: The Aging Brain
programs.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programs.title: I Survived
programs.desc: A soldier tries to kill another soldier; a hunter in the mountains; killer still in the house.

programs.title: I Survived
programs.desc: A woman is abducted by another woman who tries to steal her unborn baby; a geologist is attacked by a bear; a woman is shot and held hostage.
